===Pokémon===
[[File:Clemont and his Pokémon.png|thumb|250px|Clemont and some of his Pokémon in ''[[Pokémon the Series: XY]]'']]
Clemont mostly specializes in {{type|Electric}}s and has a lot of knowledge about them. However, after being kicked out of his Gym by [[Clembot]] and during his travels with Ash, Clemont obtained some Pokémon outside of that preference. Clemont's Pokémon are pretty strong in battle, as they have shown to withstand any battle, even if they are battling a Pokémon that they are weak against. Clemont also has his Pokémon help him with his inventions, such as using his {{TP|Clemont|Luxray}}'s electricity.

Clemont mostly keeps his Electric-type Pokémon at the Gym, expect for his {{TP|Clemont|Dedenne}}, who is under {{an|Bonnie}}'s care, and Luxray, so Clembot has some to use for challengers while he isn't at the Gym. Clemont's strongest Electric types are {{TP|Clemont|Heliolisk}} and Luxray. Like {{an|Brock}}, Clemont has more than six Pokémon, but doesn't have a full party.

This listing is of Clemont's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
